rootCause: GitHub runners upgraded to Ubuntu 24.04 lacked newly renamed system libraries (libatk*-t64, libcups2t64, libasound2t64, libgbm1, and related X11 deps) so Playwright's Chromium launch aborted with a missing dependencies error before any tests executed.
resolution: Updated tests.yml to apt-get install the Ubuntu 24 runtime packages Playwright requires and added an e2e coverage check to assert the workflow continues installing those libraries.
